hero.name: Swann Patissier
hero.description: Computer Science student & founder of Lymen. I craft modern digital experiences, from design to production, and much more.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: My journey
about.text_1: Passionate about web development and interface design since high school, I turned this passion into a professional journey. From my first creations to founding Lymen, every step brought me closer to my goal.
about.text_2: Currently in my 2nd year of Computer Science, I combine academic training with entrepreneurial experience to deliver complete digital solutions.
about.card_bac_desc: Strong scientific education, foundations in mathematics and physics.
about.card_studies_desc: First entrepreneurial project: clothing brand creation and first web design work.
about.card_but_desc: Development, networks, databases and IT project management.
about.card_lymen_desc: Tech company and its subsidiaries: Genesis (web development) and Aegis (automated cybersecurity).

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.text: Have a project in mind? An opportunity to share? Don't hesitate to reach out.
